query: What happens if I violate the insider trading policy?
expected_answer: Violations may lead to disciplinary action including termination, SEC referral, and potential criminal charges.
ground_truth_context: Any violation of this Insider Trading Policy will result in severe disciplinary action. This may include immediate termination of employment. Furthermore, the company is obligated to refer violations to the SEC and other regulatory bodies, which could result in civil penalties and criminal charges.

query: Who approves exceptions to the blackout period?
expected_answer: Exceptions to the blackout period must be approved by the Chief Legal Officer (CLO) or via a pre-approved 10b5-1 plan.
ground_truth_context: Under rare circumstances, hardship exceptions to the trading blackout period may be granted. Such exceptions require written pre-approval from the Chief Legal Officer (CLO). Alternatively, trades executed under a previously established corporate 10b5-1 trading plan are exempt.

query: What is the standard blackout period duration?
expected_answer: The blackout period starts 15 days before the end of the fiscal quarter and ends one full trading day after earnings release.
ground_truth_context: The standard quarterly blackout period commences 15 calendar days prior to the last day of the fiscal quarter. This blackout period remains in effect and concludes after one full trading day has elapsed following the public release of the company's quarterly earnings.

query: What is the maximum reimbursement for dinner during business travel?
expected_answer: The maximum reimbursement for dinner is $75 per day, itemized receipts required.
ground_truth_context: For domestic business travel, employees have a daily meal per diem. Breakfast is capped at $25, lunch at $35, and dinner at $75. Itemized receipts must be submitted for any meal exceeding $25.

query: How many days of PTO do employees get in their first year?
expected_answer: First-year employees receive 15 days of PTO.
ground_truth_context: Paid Time Off (PTO) accrues based on tenure. Employees in their first through third years of service earn 15 days of PTO annually. Starting in year four, this increases to 20 days.

query: Is alcohol a reimbursable travel expense?
expected_answer: No, alcohol is not reimbursable unless at a pre-approved client entertainment event.
ground_truth_context: Personal expenses are non-reimbursable. This includes but is not limited to: in-room movies, minibar purchases, and alcohol. Alcohol may only be expensed if it is part of a pre-approved client entertainment dinner.

query: What is the process for reporting a security incident?
expected_answer: Report it immediately to the IT Helpdesk and email security@novasearch.io.
ground_truth_context: If you suspect a data breach, malware infection, or any other security incident, you must report it immediately. Contact the IT Helpdesk by phone and send an email detailing the incident to security@novasearch.io. Do not attempt to fix the issue yourself.

query: Can I use my personal laptop for work?
expected_answer: Only if enrolled in the BYOD program and installed with company MDM software.
ground_truth_context: Employees may use personal devices for work purposes only if they are officially enrolled in the Bring Your Own Device (BYOD) program. All BYOD devices must have the company's Mobile Device Management (MDM) software installed to ensure data security.

query: What is the parental leave policy?
expected_answer: Primary caregivers receive 16 weeks of fully paid leave; secondary caregivers receive 8 weeks.
ground_truth_context: We support growing families. Primary caregivers are eligible for 16 weeks of fully paid parental leave following the birth or adoption of a child. Secondary caregivers are eligible for 8 weeks of fully paid leave.

query: How frequently must passwords be changed?
expected_answer: Passwords must be changed every 90 days and require at least 14 characters.
ground_truth_context: Account security is paramount. All network and application passwords expire and must be changed every 90 days. Passwords must be a minimum of 14 characters long and include an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character.

query: Who is eligible for the annual performance bonus?
expected_answer: All full-time employees employed before October 1st of the performance year.
ground_truth_context: The annual performance bonus is distributed in Q1 of the following year. To be eligible, you must be a full-time employee and have started your employment with the company on or before October 1st of the performance year.

query: What is the company's 401(k) match?
expected_answer: The company matches 100% of the first 4% of employee contributions.
ground_truth_context: Our retirement plan includes an employer match to help you save. The company matches 100% of your pre-tax or Roth 401(k) contributions up to the first 4% of your eligible compensation.

query: How do I request an ergonomic workstation assessment?
expected_answer: Submit a ticket through the HR portal under the 'Workplace Health' category.
ground_truth_context: To ensure a healthy working environment, employees can request an ergonomic assessment of their desk setup. Please submit a request ticket through the HR portal, selecting the 'Workplace Health and Safety' category.

query: What is the policy on external speaking engagements?
expected_answer: All external speaking engagements must be cleared by Corporate Communications at least 30 days in advance.
ground_truth_context: Employees representing the company at conferences, panels, or public forums must obtain prior approval. Submit a brief to the Corporate Communications team at least 30 days before the event to ensure messaging alignment.

query: Are contractors allowed to access source code repositories?
expected_answer: Only if explicitly approved by a VP of Engineering and granted temporary, scoped access.
ground_truth_context: Contractors and vendors generally do not have access to internal source code. Exceptions require direct approval from a VP of Engineering, after which IT will grant temporary, read-only access scoped to the specific project repository.

query: What is the company's anti-harassment policy?
expected_answer: The company maintains a zero-tolerance policy for any form of harassment or discrimination.
ground_truth_context: We are committed to a safe and inclusive workplace. We maintain a zero-tolerance policy regarding harassment, bullying, or discrimination of any kind based on race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, or disability.

query: How to handle a media inquiry?
expected_answer: Do not comment. Forward the inquiry immediately to PR@novasearch.io.
ground_truth_context: If contacted by a journalist or media representative regarding company business, politely decline to comment. Immediately forward the inquiry, including the reporter's contact info, to PR@novasearch.io.

query: What is the standard hardware refresh cycle?
expected_answer: Laptops are refreshed every 3 years for engineers, and every 4 years for other departments.
ground_truth_context: IT manages hardware lifecycle replacements automatically. Engineering laptops are on a 3-year refresh cycle due to higher compute demands. All other departmental laptops are on a 4-year refresh cycle.

query: Can I bring my dog to the office?
expected_answer: Yes, but only on designated 'Dog Fridays' and with proof of vaccination provided to HR.
ground_truth_context: We love pets, but for allergy and safety reasons, everyday access is restricted. Dogs are allowed in the office exclusively on 'Dog Fridays'. Pet owners must submit up-to-date vaccination records to HR beforehand.

query: What happens if I lose my corporate credit card?
expected_answer: Call the bank immediately to freeze the card, then report it to the Finance team.
ground_truth_context: A lost or stolen corporate credit card must be handled swiftly. First, call the issuing bank's 24/7 hotline to freeze the card. Second, email the Finance team within 24 hours so they can issue a replacement.
